images.use_when: vision, image analysis, data visualization, chart, describe
images.description: Bar chart showing quarterly revenue with labeled axes and values
images.content_hint: Q1=$2.1M, Q2=$3.4M, Q3=$2.8M, Q4=$4.8M. Blue/green/orange/red bars on white background.

images.use_when: vision, system diagram, architecture, explain structure
images.description: System architecture diagram with 4 service boxes connected by arrows
images.content_hint: API Gateway (blue) connects to Auth Service (green) and Data Store (orange). Both connect to ML Engine (purple).

images.use_when: general vision, photo description, object detection, scene
images.description: Synthetic workspace desk with laptop showing terminal output, coffee mug, notebook, and pen
images.content_hint: Wooden desk surface. Laptop displaying green terminal text (python train.py). White coffee mug with brown liquid. Lined notebook with writing. Black pen.

images.use_when: file size error testing, upload validation, size limit
images.description: Random noise image intentionally >20MB to trigger file size validation

audio.use_when: audio transcription, speech-to-text, voice input, WAV upload
audio.description: Tone pattern WAV file (morse-like sequence + frequency sweep) for transcription testing
audio.expected_behavior: Audio file accepted by upload. Transcription response expected (may be empty for tone-only input on real models).

documents.use_when: PDF upload, document analysis, OCR, vision, extract data
documents.description: Single-page invoice from Acme Technology Corp to DataFlow Inc
documents.content_hint: Invoice #INV-1042, dated June 15 2025. 3 line items: ML Pipeline Setup ($2,500), Custom Model Training 40x$35 ($1,400), Production Deployment ($350). Total: $4,250.00.

text_prompts.use_when: vision model chat, image description, multimodal, after image upload
text_prompts.description: Prompt asking model to describe and analyze an uploaded image

text_prompts.use_when: code generation, code explanation, developer tools, text-only model
text_prompts.description: Code explanation request with a sliding window substring function

text_prompts.use_when: summarization, text processing, general chat, text-only model
text_prompts.description: Research findings summary request — realistic enterprise UX research paragraph

multi-image-conversation.description: For AC-7: upload multiple images in sequence to test conversation context retention

steps.note: First image: user uploads chart and asks for analysis

steps.prompt: Now look at this second image. How does the system architecture relate to the revenue data from the previous chart?
steps.note: Second image: user uploads diagram and asks model to reference BOTH images

multi-image-conversation.success_criteria: Both images visible in conversation history. Model response references content from both (revenue numbers AND service names).
